mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND location_id = #{locationId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO inventory (product_id, warehouse_id, location_id, quantity, version) VALUES (#{productId}, #{warehouseId}, #{locationId}, #{qty}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + #{qty}, version = version + 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (product_id, warehouse_id, location_id, quantity, version) VALUES (#{productId}, #{warehouseId}, #{locationId}, #{quantity}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT iv.id, iv.quantity, p.product_name, p.product_code, p.cost_price, p.min_stock, p.max_stock, wh.warehouse_name, sl.location_name, CASE WHEN iv.quantity < p.min_stock THEN '低于最低库存' WHEN iv.quantity > p.max_stock THEN '高于最高库存' END as warn_type FROM inventory iv JOIN product p ON iv.product_id = p.id JOIN warehouse wh ON iv.warehouse_id = wh.id JOIN storage_location sl ON iv.location_id = sl.id WHERE iv.quantity < p.min_stock OR iv.quantity > p.max_stock ORDER BY iv.quantity ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory iv JOIN product p ON iv.product_id = p.id WHERE iv.quantity < p.min_stock OR iv.quantity > p.max_stock
